betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Saturnite§f

§aA bizarre superalloy with exceptional heat and corrosion resistance — essential for antimatter storage and end-game machines!§f

§bSaturnite§f is a very durable, heat-resistant, and corrosion-resistant superalloy used in containers, weapons, and knives. Its properties are quite unusual — when used in guns, its bullets set things on fire!

§6Properties§f:
• Very durable, hard, but brittle
• Excellent neutron reflector — useful for nuclear science machines
• Much better than tungsten in many aspects
• Bizarre: with starmetal + chlorine pinwheel → infinite chlorine vent

§6Production§f (§bRotary Furnace§f):
§b• Standard:§f 250 mB Reformate Gas + Copper Powder + 4× High-Speed Steel Powder → §e2 Ingots§f
§b• Boosted:§f Add Borax → §e4 Ingots§f (double yield!)

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Antimatter Barrel§f — essential for antimatter storage
§b• Guns§f — higher durability variants, bullets ignite targets
§b• Asteroid Mining Ship§f — fuselage and shielding
§b• Fusion Reactor§f — lining and neutron shielding
§b• Spacecraft Shielding§f — for long-range vessels
§b• BF Rocket Fuselages§f

§b• Saturnite Plate§f — used in most items, blocks, and machines
• Combine with Meteorite Ingot → §bStarmetal§f

§eTip§f: Always use the §bBorax-boosted recipe§f if you have borax available — it doubles your saturnite output! You'll need a lot of saturnite for antimatter barrels and the asteroid mining ship.
